Klasse SceneDeviceStateRequest

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.dto.request.SceneDeviceStateRequest
public class SceneDeviceStateRequest extends Object
The desired state for one device within a scene (FR-17).

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    @NotNull Long
    deviceId
    Identifier of the target device.
    Double
    targetLevel
    Target numeric level.
    Boolean
    targetSwitchedOn
    Target on/off state for SWITCH.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    SceneDeviceStateRequest()
    Creates an empty request; fields are populated during deserialization.

  • Felddetails

    • deviceId

      @NotNull public @NotNull Long deviceId
      Identifier of the target device.

    • targetSwitchedOn

      public Boolean targetSwitchedOn
      Target on/off state for SWITCH. Null = do not change this aspect.

    • targetLevel

      public Double targetLevel
      Target numeric level. Null = do not change this aspect.
